title: crotalaria congoensis
intro: Crotalaria congoensis, also known as Congo weed, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria congoensis include its potential to treat fever, headache, and rheumatism, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria congoensis is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
